(LKS/404) PETITIONER (MARY ANNE OLIVA) IN PRO PER. N/A BY RESPONDENT. PETITIONER WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT GRANTED PETITIONER'S REQUEST AND AWARDED HER (MOTHER) SOLE L/C & SOLE P/C OF THE THREE MINOR CHILDREN.
